_key_note: Get a free key at https://openrouter.ai  — or set env var OPENROUTER_API_KEY instead.
_model_note: Any model on https://openrouter.ai/models that supports tool/function calling.
_delay_note: Seconds to wait between API calls. Increase if you hit rate limits.
_brave_note: Optional. Free key at https://brave.com/search/api/ (1000 req/month). Used as web search fallback.

sap_defaults._comment: Default SAP values written into the ME51N import sheet.
